# Focus Forecast

> A Pomodoro tracker that forecasts how much you'll focus tomorrow — then dares you to beat the line. Pure-static PWA, installable to phone, no signup, no backend.

## What this tool does
- Input: nothing — start the timer and work; the app auto-logs each completed focus session
- Output: a daily focus tally + a 7-day forecast band + per-category breakdown (deep work, coding, reading, writing, meetings, other)
- Storage: browser localStorage. Export/import via CSV.
- Forecast: weekday-mean baseline runs in JavaScript. A deeper Google TimesFM 2.5 forecast is available locally via the Python backend in the same repo.
- PWA: installable on iOS/Android home screen, works offline, screen Wake Lock + completion notifications when permitted.

## Who built this
Built by Sachin Rai, enterprise sales professional at Freshworks.
Sachin builds AI-powered sales and productivity tools.

## How to use this tool
Open the URL on phone or desktop. Tap **Start** on the Pomodoro card to begin a focus session. When it completes, minutes auto-log to today's tally. Use **Skip** for partial credit, **Reset** to scrap a session. Pick your category from the dropdown before starting. Logged data is yours — export anytime as CSV.

## Contact
For questions, collaborations, or feedback: sachinai1981@gmail.com

## Sitemap
- /index.html — main app: Pomodoro timer, KPIs, forecast chart, category breakdown, manual log, CSV import/export
- /manifest.webmanifest — PWA manifest (allows install-to-home-screen)
- /service-worker.js — offline cache layer
- /llms.txt — this file
- /.well-known/agent.json — agent-discoverable metadata
